title: Mica (disambiguation)
content:
'''Mica''' could refer to:

=='''[[Canon]]'''==
*'''[[Mica (human)|Mica]]''', a [[human]] who served as an [[Aide|assistant]] to [[Lina Soh]]

=='''[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]'''==
*'''[[Mica (Fregan)|Mica]]''', a [[Gender/Legends|woman]] from [[Frego]]
*'''[[Mica (smuggler)|Mica]]''', a victim of the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*'''[[Mica (mineral)|Mica]],''' a mineral native to [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]

{{Disambig}}
